description_long: This is a hexagonal wooden nightstand with a distinctive multi-tiered design. The top surface is bordered by a raised edge and supported by four turned wooden columns, creating an open shelf beneath. Below the shelf, the main body features four drawers, each with ornate brass handles, and some drawers are shown partially open, revealing their depth. The wood has a rich, dark brown finish with visible grain patterns, giving it a classic and elegant appearance. The nightstand stands on a solid hexagonal base, and the craftsmanship suggests a blend of traditional and decorative styles. The overall structure is robust, with the open shelf and multiple drawers providing both storage and display functionality.
description: A hexagonal, dark wood nightstand with four drawers, brass handles, and an open shelf supported by columns. The design is ornate and traditional, with a raised top and visible wood grain.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing three drawers, one fully open, and the open shelf supported by four columns.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the open bottom drawer and the hexagonal shape of the nightstand.
description_view_2: Rear-left view displaying the closed drawers and the open shelf, with the hexagonal structure clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear-right view showing a partially open middle drawer and the ornate handles, with the open shelf above.
attribute_leg_design: short turned wooden columns supporting upper shelf, solid hexagonal base
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
